# Documentation Templates

Use these templates as starting points for new durable service docs.

| Template                                           | Use for                                                          |
| -------------------------------------------------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------- |
| [prd.md](prd.md)                                   | Product requirements                                             |
| [feature.md](feature.md)                           | Feature-scoped brief under `features/FEAT-NNNN-<slug>/README.md` |
| [design.md](design.md)                             | Technical design                                                 |
| [adr.md](adr.md)                                   | Architecture decision                                            |
| [api-contract.md](api-contract.md)                 | API contract                                                     |
| [implementation-plan.md](implementation-plan.md)   | Large implementation strategy                                    |
| [engineering-standard.md](engineering-standard.md) | Engineering conventions                                          |
| [runbook.md](runbook.md)                           | Operational runbook                                              |
| [archive-note.md](archive-note.md)                 | Superseded/historical docs                                       |

After creating a document, update the relevant parent `README.md` with a relative link.
